Title: Unwritten Ages: A Personal Saga
Concept: Experience history not through grand battles, but through the intimate triumphs and quiet struggles of individual lives.
Website Product Description: Step into a richly detailed historical world where you live out a unique human story, not as a conqueror, but as an ordinary person. Discover the daily life of a devoted craftsman striving for perfection in ancient Kyoto, or a curious scholar seeking knowledge in Edo Japan. Every personal choice you make—from your skills and relationships to your deepest aspirations—will ripple through your life, shaping your destiny and subtly influencing the historical events unfolding around you. Feel the profound emotional impact as sweeping changes affect your family, your community, and your sense of identity. This game allows you to truly *live* history, crafting a deeply resonant legacy of creation, preservation, and human connection that history books rarely record, but players will feel deeply.

Title: Shattered Minds: A Detective's Dream
Concept: Unravel crimes by piecing together fractured memories and shifting realities.
Website Product Description: Step into a detective game where reality is your biggest suspect. You're not just investigating crime scenes; you're delving into the very fabric of perception. As a uniquely skilled investigator, you will navigate the fragmented memories and distorted truths of witnesses and suspects. Every clue is a whisper from a dream, a blurred vision, or a half-forgotten emotion. Your mission is to piece together these abstract fragments, identifying inconsistencies and weaving a coherent story from a world of conflicting perceptions. Solve logic-bending puzzles, explore surreal mental landscapes, and question everything you think you know to uncover the truth hidden within the fractured minds of others. Can you restore order to chaos before time runs out?
